Each setting is shown load-bearing (k_lock=0.15->0.1, eta_shell=0.1->0.231, mixed_bcc(eps=.5)->2.0, family->0.05). 3 source sha256 pinned. a1_kernel_checks.py v1.5 = 14/14, standalone-reproducible. Gates pass but 'OPERATOR CERTIFICATION PENDING' -- T1 OPEN. Math424 cert + v1.3 mimic WITHDRAWN; mimic excluded from the v1.5 bundle.
title: Production kernel manifest: parameter-consistency gates (current config is a mock)
statement: A config stores (r_zero, mu2_shell, q0, Z, Y, eta_shell) + a 7-key scalar_slice (laplacian_mode, bcc_mix_epsilon, a_bcc, family_masses, k_lock, z0, eta_shell). The N-001 solver symbol is bloch_matrix_linear(|k|,{r,Z,Y,q0,**scalar_slice}); (r,Z)=kinetic_coefficients(mu2_shell,Y,q0). Gates delta_Z,delta_m,delta_r (separate tolerances); CONSISTENCY: Y>0,Z<0,deltas; ANALYTIC-BRANCH: +mu2_shell>0 AND the scalar_slice (eta_shell=0, k_lock=0, spectral, etc.) reproduces the stored r_zero+Z|k|^2+Y|k|^4. The verifier asserts schema completeness, reads the scalar_slice AS-IS, imports the ORIGINAL solver, and confirms the runtime symbol = stored kernel; each scalar_slice setting is shown load-bearing. Canonical N-001 clears both manifests AND matches the real solver (gates pass; certification pending). Alias mu2=r FORBIDDEN; template (0.35,-1,0.50) FAILS.
scope: pure-Brazovskii scalar slice certification (CONSISTENCY + ANALYTIC-BRANCH); verifier reads the full runtime scalar_slice from JSON and imports the ORIGINAL N-001 solver; full anisotropic operator excluded.
falsifier: A config passing all gates with m_sh^2>0 closes the OPEN status for that config (admits it as production).
no_overclaim: scalar slice only (full anisotropic/locked/shell-biased operator excluded); gates passing is NOT certification; NOT yet operator-certified, NOT yet A2/A3-citable; Math424 cert + v1.3 mimic WITHDRAWN.
next_action: Operator certifies the N-001 ANALYTIC-BRANCH manifest (ratify eps_Z,eps_m,eps_r + config/solver sha256).
